manipulation_debut.title: Erevane
manipulation_debut.narrator: You leave before the four can answer.
manipulation_debut.text:
You're not running.

Running would mean you're scared.

You're walking.

The black blade against your flank.
The throat still marked by the heat of the blade of Ikar.

Behind you, the camp remains silent.

Nobody shouts your name.

Not yet.

It's almost worse.

Aryn could have spoken.
Taera could have followed you.
Vael could have appeared in front of you with a bad joke.
Ikar could've blocked you.

Nothing.

Then you keep going.

Somewhere in front of you, Erevane is waiting for you.

And for the first time since Cendral,
You know exactly where to go.

choices.text: Look one last time behind you.

dernier_regard.title: The Last Look
dernier_regard.text:
You turn around.

The camp is still here.

Kid.
Grey.
Fragile under dawn.

You see a silhouette.

Aryn.

She's up.

She's not following you.

She's only looking at you.

Even from afar, you know she understands.

Not that she accepts.

Let her understand.

It's almost enough to get you back.

Then you think about the blade under your throat.

In Ikar.
To their silences.
In that sentence.

* Ready for anything. *

You turn around.

This time you're not looking.

ne_pas_retourner.title: Without Return
ne_pas_retourner.text:
The sun is rising.

You're walking a long time.

At first, every noise behind you makes your heart beat.

A branch.
A bird.
The wind in the grass.

You expect the four to come out.

But no one's coming.

Solitude comes slowly.

Then completely.

And when she's here,
You realize something strange.

The blade is quieter.

Less cold.

As if she too was breathing away from them.

route_seul.title: One Moment Alone
route_seul.text:
You spend the day in the hills.

No voice.
No advice.
No worries.

Nobody tells you to breathe.
Nobody tells you to put the blade down.
Nobody's watching your hands.

You thought silence would scare.

But no.

Silence doesn't judge you.

At night, you light a fire.

Not with wood.

With the blade.

A purple light licks the stones.

She's not burning.

She keeps the heat.

You smile in spite of yourself.

Maybe they were wrong.

Maybe alone, you can learn differently.

retrouver_erevane.title: The One Who Waits
retrouver_erevane.text:
Erevane's here.

Sitting near an old terminal.

Like he never doubted you'd come.

He's not smiling too fast.

He doesn't get up too fast.

He'll let you get close.

Maybe that's what keeps you down.

He's not asking for anything.

**"You left. *

**"Yes. *

**"They tried to stop you? *

You think of Aryn standing in the morning.

**"No. *

Erevane's looking down.

**"Then they were afraid of what they would have done if they tried. *

The sentence comes into you too easily.

erevane_doute.title: The Doubt
erevane_doute.text:
**"I don't know anymore. *

Erevane nods her head.

Not like someone who wins.

Like someone who understands.

**"That's honest. *

He gives you a gourd.

You drink.

**"Beware of people who never doubt.** he said.

You're thinking about Ikar.

Then you.

**"And people who doubt too much? *

Erevane finally smiled.

**"These are tiring. *

You're laughing.

A short laugh.
Broken.

But a laugh anyway.

erevane_ecoute.title: Listening
erevane_ecoute.text:
Erevane doesn't talk much that night.

He's listening.

You tell Cendral.
Marek.
The blade.
The Four.
Throat.
Fear.

Sometimes you stop, sure you said too much.

But he never looks at you like a disaster.

Never like a gun.

Never like a mission.

He looks at you like someone.

And that's exactly what you needed.

That's why you don't see the trap.

Because a trap that looks like compassion
Don't make any noise when it closes.

choices.text: Ask why the Order is lying.

ordre_mensonge.title: What the Cache Order
ordre_mensonge.text:
**"Why would the Order hide this? *

Erevane stirs the embers with a stick.

**"Because a world built on fear must protect its fear. *

**"What does that mean? *

**"That if they admit that Chaos can be something other than a threat..."**
**"...then they must admit that they were wrong for three hundred years. *

He's looking at you.

**"Institutions sometimes prefer to sacrifice a person rather than a certainty. *

You'd like to think that's an exaggeration.

But you still feel Ikar's blade under your throat.

erevane_nuance.title: Nuance
erevane_nuance.text:
**"The Four are not the Order. *

Erevane nods her head.

**"No. *

The answer surprises you.

**"They may really love you. *

The word hurts.

**"Then why..."**

**"Because love is not always enough to disobey a fear learned since childhood. *

He doesn't insult them.

He doesn't even really accuse them.

It's worse.

He makes their betrayal sadder.

So more credible.

lecon_chaos.title: The First Lesson
lecon_chaos.text:
The next day Erevane takes you to a long burned clearing.

No tree has pushed back.

**"The Chaos is not destroyed.** he said.

You look at the dead ground.

**"Wrong example. *

He smiles.

**"Chaos is what remains when the imposed forms break. *

**"It looks a lot like destruction. *

**"Only for those who liked the form before. *

He's laying a stone in front of you.

**"Cut it. *

You draw.

The black blade absorbs light.

Then she sings.

pierre_douce.title: The Stone
pierre_douce.text:
You hit slowly.

The blade enters the stone.

No shock.
No noise.

As if the stone had forgotten that it had to resist.

A purple line opens.

The stone splits in two.

Erevane observes.

**"See? *

**"I cut it. *

**"No. *

He picks up both pieces.

**"You reminded her that she could be something other than everything. *

That's absurd.

And yet.

The blade in your hand seems lighter.

pierre_choisit.title: The Blade Choisit
pierre_choisit.text:
You're not running it.

You let the blade move.

The world becomes purple.

Just a second.

The stone disappears.

Not broken.

Not reduced to dust.

Absent.

A circle of earth collapses around you.

Erevane doesn't step back.

He looks at the void where the stone was laid.

Her eyes are shining.

Just a second.

Then he lowers his head.

**"Magnificent. *

The word scares you.

And pleasure.

progres.title: Progress
progres.text:
You learn fast.

Too fast.

The black blade is no longer only cold.
She's responding.

It absorbs sounds when you need silence.
She cuts the shadows when the night is too heavy.
It opens paths in the rocks.

Erevane says you're not losing control.

You're giving up bad gestures.

The ones the Order would have taught you.

The ones the Four would have imposed on you.

Sometimes you think about them.

Less often every day.

ils_te_cherchent.title: They're looking for you.
ils_te_cherchent.text:
**"They're looking for me? *

Erevane closes the book he was reading.

**"Yes. *

Your heart is closing.

**"To bring me back? *

**"Probably. *

**"To help me? *

Erevane doesn't answer right away.

He lets you fill the silence.

You fill it with all the wrong answers.

Finally, he says:

**"They probably think that's what they do. *

You hate your head.

There.

That's exactly it.

They think.

premiere_perte.title: The Merchant
premiere_perte.text:
The first real accident arrives on a bridge.

A merchant won't let you through.

Not bad.

He recognized the blade.

His hands tremble on the reins.

**« Turn around. *

You're trying to talk.

The horse panics.
The cart flips.
A child screams in the back.

You're reaching out.

The blade reacts before you.

The Chaos stops the cart.

But the bridge cracks.

An entire arch collapses in the river.

Nobody dies.

This time.

The merchant is looking at you.

Not with gratitude.

Horrible.

reparer_pont.title: Repair
reparer_pont.text:
You're trying to fix it.

You lay your hand on the split stone.

You're thinking about Taera.

The way he touched the ground before he acted.

The stone trembles.

For a moment, you think you can do it.

Then a violet crack crosses the remaining arch.

The merchant's back.

**"Stop. *

His voice is sweet.

Substitute.

**"Please. *

Then you stop.

You understand something.

Even when you want to fix,
People are afraid of what your hands can do.

partir_pont.title: Leave
partir_pont.text:
You're leaving.

Behind you, the merchant calls the child by his name.

Again.
Again.

The child finally answers.

You're out.

You didn't know you were holding your breath.

Erevane walks next to you.

He doesn't blame you.

It's almost pleasant.

It's almost worse.

erevane_console.title: Consolation
erevane_console.text:
**"You saved him. "** says Erevane.

**"I destroyed the bridge. *

**"A bridge is rebuilt. *

**"What if someone was dead? *

He walks a long time without answering.

Then:

**"All authorities have a cost. *

**"Easy to say when you don't pay. *

He stops.

For the first time, he looks hurt.

**"Do you think I paid nothing? *

You don't know what to answer.

Then he starts walking again.

And you follow him.

erevane_perte.title: What He Lost
erevane_perte.text:
**"What did you lose? *

Erevane doesn't turn around.

*"A brother. *

The word falls between you.

Simple.
Heavy.

**"Because of the Chaos? *

**"Because of those who claimed to understand it. *

He continues.

"My brother believed that Caël could be saved. *
**"He was called heretic. *
**« Cleared from archives. *

He finally stops.

**"We made her voice disappear. *

His eyes are damp.

You believe him.

Because it's true.

It's only incomplete.

lecon_memoire.title: Memory
lecon_memoire.text:
Erevane takes you to ruins covered in foam.

Names are engraved on the walls.

Some erased.

**"The Chaos keeps what the world rejects.** he said.

You put your fingers on a broken inscription.

A pain is going through you.

Not yours.

Someone begging.
Someone fleeing.
Someone we forget voluntarily.

You take your hand off.

**"What was that? *

**"A memory. *

**« Whose memory? *

**"Of all those we have decided not to hear anymore. *

The black blade vibrates.

As if she recognized the deleted names.

ecouter_memoires.title: Voices
ecouter_memoires.text:
You're listening.

Error.

Or miracle.

The voices are rising.

Too many.

Children.
Old people.
Soldiers.
Failed porters.
People burned by a prophecy before they even acted.

Their fears come into your chest.

Their anger, too.

You're on your knees.

Erevane put a hand on your shoulder.

**"Don't push them back. *

**"It hurts. *

**"Yes. *

His voice trembles.

**"At last someone hears them. *

Then you keep going.

Because how can we refuse the dead?

ville_rouge.title: The Red City
ville_rouge.text:
Sorn is a red town.

Red bricks.
Red roofs.
Red dust in the streets.

You should have bypassed her.

But Erevane needs ink.
Food.
Cards.

And you need to prove that you can cross a city without disaster.

For an hour, it works.

Nobody knows you.

Then a child sees the blade under your coat.

He's pointing.

Silence returns.

Still the same.

Like an old song we hate
But we know by heart.

sorn_ignore.title: Ignore
sorn_ignore.text:
You look down.

You're moving.

A man whispers:

**"That's him. *

You keep going.

One woman answered:

**"The Blades are looking for him. *

You stop.

The Blades.

So they're approaching.

Erevane put a light hand on your back.

**"Not here. *

You hate your head.

He's right.

Not here.

Not in front of these people.

Not yet.

sorn_fixe.title: Watch Back
sorn_fixe.text:
You raise your head.

The murmurs die one by one.

The light around you gets colder.

More purple.

A fruit stall wilts.

A window splits.

Nobody's moving.

You didn't mean to scare them.

But part of you is relieved that they are silent.

This part disgusts you.

Erevane takes you gently by the arm.

**"Come. *

Not an order.

A rescue.

You follow him.

auberge_sorn.title: The Inn
auberge_sorn.text:
You take a room upstairs.

Erevane closes the shutters.

Not to lock you up.

To protect you from eyes.

That's what he says.

You sit on the bed.

The black blade on your knees.

It vibrates slowly.

Downstairs, the conversations resume.

Lower.

Faster.

Then a noise outside.

Sabots.

A voice you know.

Aryn.

demander_erevane.title: What to do
demander_erevane.text:
**"What am I doing? *

Erevane looks at the door.

Then you.

**"Whatever you want. *

The answer is annoying.

**"This is not the time. *

**"That's the point. *

He's approaching.

**"All your life, we'll tell you this is not the time to choose. *
**"You're too dangerous. *
**"Too injured. *
**"Too unstable. *

Down there, a chair falls.

**"Then choose now. *

You're up.

les_quatre_arrivent.title: They're here.
les_quatre_arrivent.location: Sorn — Street in front of the inn
les_quatre_arrivent.text:
The Four are on the street.

Aryn in mind.
Taera right behind.
Vael on the roof across the street.
Ikar in the middle of the road.

They look exhausted.

Dirty.
Wounded.

Like they haven't slept in days.

Your heart is closing in spite of you.

Then Ikar looks up at the window.

He sees you.

Just a second.

Relief.

Then he sees Erevane behind you.

Everything changes.

Her blade is burning.

rester_pres_erevane.title: Near Yerevane
rester_pres_erevane.text:
You're not coming down.

Not yet.

Erevane stay calm.

Too quiet.

Down below, Ikar screams:

**"Get away from him! *

Not: *come back. *
Not: We need to talk. *

Get away from him.

Like you can't choose who to stay with.

Like you still belong to their decision.

Erevane's looking down.

**"I'm sorry. *

**"From what? *

He's not answering.

It's worse than an answer.

descendre_rue.title: Red Street
descendre_rue.location: Sorn — In front of the hostel
descendre_rue.text:
You're coming down.

Street's empty.

The shutters are closed.

The locals are still watching.

Always.

Aryn is taking a step towards you.

**"We're not coming to take you back. *

You want to believe her.

Then Ikar points his blade to Erevane.

**"He, on the other hand, comes with us. *

Erevane don't move.

He's not hiding behind you.

He's not begging.

He's waiting.

choices.text: Put you in front of Erevane.

pourquoi_erevane.title: Why Him
pourquoi_erevane.text:
**"Why him? *

Aryn's responding too fast.

**"Because he manipulates you. *

The word hits you.

*Manipule. *

**"How do you know? *

**"Because we know him. "** says Aryn.
**"Erevane has existed for a long time. *
**"Too long. *
**"He was there in the time of Cael too. *

The ground is disappearing.

**"What? *

**"He was not old at the time. *
**"But he was there. *
**"He told her the same thing. *
**"Another prophecy. *
**"Another way. *
**"Away from the four wise men. *

**"And Caël..."**

**"Caël followed him. "** says Aryn.
**"And he destroyed everything. *
**"Alone. *

devant_erevane.title: Before Him
devant_erevane.text:
You're standing in front of Erevane.

The black blade in your hand.

Aryn's fading.

**"Don't do that. *

*"Me? *

You're laughing.

Not because it's funny.

**"You arrive in arms. *
**"You threaten the only man who told me the truth. *
**"And I do something? *

Ikar tightens his teeth.

**"He's lying. *

**"Like you? *

Nobody answers fast enough.

That's enough.

ikar_attaque.title: Error
ikar_attaque.text:
Ikar attacks.

Not you.

Erevane.

It crosses the street like a flame launched.

Too fast for Aryn to stop him.
Too fast for Taera to scream.
Too fast for Vael to get off the roof.

Erevane doesn't even raise her hands.

The old man stays here.

Fragile.
Right.
Sad.

** "No."** he said.

Not in Ikar.

Your turn.

**"Not for me. *

But it's too late.

Your black blade goes up.

bloquer_ikar.title: Blocking
bloquer_ikar.text:
Your blade blocks Ikar's.

Fire against empty.

The street disappears in a purple flash.

The windows explode.
The pavements rise.
A wall collapses further.

Someone screams.

Ikar's taking three steps back.

Her eyes don't leave Erevane.

**"Go away. *

**"No. *

**"You don't understand what he's doing. *

**"I understand exactly. *

And that's the problem.

You understand.

repousser_tous.title: The Wave
repousser_tous.text:
You're not blocking.

You reject.

Everything.

A purple wave comes from you.

Ikar is projected against a fountain.
Aryn slides on the pavements.
Taera sets up a wall of earth that cracks immediately.
Vael disappears just before he gets hit.

Houses are shaking.

A fireplace falls.

A voice calls for help behind a shutter.

You hear me.

But you can't stop fast enough.

When the silence returns,
Red town has a black scar.

accuser_quatre.title: Since the beginning
accuser_quatre.text:
**"From the beginning..."**

Your voice is shaking.

The blade, too.

**"From the beginning you were just waiting for a reason. *

Aryn shakes his head.

**"No. *

Too weak.

Too late.

**"Ikar had her blade under my throat. *
**"Now you want to kill Erevane. *
**"And then? *

Taera is crying.

**"We want you back. *

**"No. *

The word comes out like a fracture.

**"You want me to be someone you can watch again. *

aryn_supplie.title: Aryn
aryn_supplie.text:
Aryn's moving ahead despite the blade.

Despite the light.

Despite the fear.

**"I beg you. *

His voice breaks.

You never heard her that way.

**"He uses your pain. *
**"I know we scared you. *
**"I know Ikar did something unforgivable. *

Ikar closes his eyes.

**"But Erevane does not want to save you. *

Erevane's not answering.

He doesn't need it.

Because behind Aryn,
Ikar is already raising his blade.

erevane_parle.title: The Last Sweet Word
erevane_parle.text:
Erevane put a hand on your shoulder.

Light.

Almost nothing.

**"You don't have to defend me.** he said.

The Four freeze.

Even Vael.

Because they hear what you don't hear yet.

The perfect trap.

Erevane continues:

**"You no longer need to prove that you deserve to exist. *

The sentence goes through you.

She finds all the wounds.

All of them.

**"The world asked you to be small. *
**"To be calm. *
**"To be forgiven. *

His hand barely shakes.

**"You can be true. *

resister_dernier.title: Resist
resister_dernier.text:
You resist.

Just a second.

Two.

You're thinking about Aryn.
To Taera.
To Vael.
Even in Ikar.

You think about what they were before fear.

Hands stretched out.
Shared meals.
Less heavy silences.

The purple light is falling.

Aryn sees it.

She's reaching out.

And behind her, a city guard shoots an arrow.

Not on you.

On Erevane.

The Chaos smells like it.

Your fear chooses before you.

chaos_repond.title: The Chaos Answers
chaos_repond.text:
The world is opening.

Not like a wound.

Like an eye.

The violet light swallows the street.

You hear the voices of the ruins.
The dead erased.
The forgotten names.
Asendral.
Marek.
The bridge.
Sorn.
Everything.

You wanted us to hear you.

Now everyone hears.

The Four are back.

Not by choice.

By force.

Erevane whispers behind you:

**"Yes. *

One word.

Too happy.

Too true.

And for the first time,
You're afraid of him.

revelation_erevane.title: Truth
revelation_erevane.text:
You turn around.

Erevane has eyes full of tears.

But they're not tears of fear.

They're someone's tears.
Who finally sees what he was waiting for.

**"I'm sorry.** he said.

**"No, you're not. *

He's lowering his head.

**"No. *

**"Your brother. *

**" He died because of Caël. *
**"And you spent three hundred years..."**

**"Looking for another carrier. *
**"Who would do what Caël did not finish. *

He raises his eyes.

**"The Chaos should not be contained. *
**"He should be released. *
**"Completely. *
**"Once and for all. *
**"To get Aerith back on track. *
**"From the beginning. *
**"Without the mistakes of the past. *

The blade vibrates.

She understands before you.

**"You didn't want to help me. *
**"You wanted to use the Chaos. *

**"Yes. *

One word.

The worst we ever told you.

mensonge_erevane.title: The Lie
mensonge_erevane.text:
**"You lied to me. *

Erevane shakes her head.

**"Never on the essential. *

**"You wanted to use me. *

**"I wanted to free what you were wearing. *

**"I'm not the Chaos. *

This time, he looks at you with almost sincere sadness.

**"No. *

He says that like a blessing.

**"You're what kept her so far. *

The sentence destroys you.

Because you understand.

The Four wanted to save you.

Erevane wanted to save the Chaos.

And you chose the one who could speak better.

combat_contre_quatre.title: Four Against One
combat_contre_quatre.text:
The Four come together.

Aryn wipes blood on his head.
Taera holds her arm against her.
Vael has no more jokes in his eyes.
Ikar is struggling to get up.

They're hurt.

They're staying.

Because obviously they're staying.

Aryn shouts your name.

Your real name.

Not the Chaos carrier. *

Not prophesy. *

Your name.

For a moment, you hear it.

Then the voices in the world shout louder.

The black blade is rising.

combat_aryn.title: Water
combat_aryn.text:
Aryn's coming first.

Not to hit.

To slow down.

His water surrounds your blade.

She's whispering something.

You don't understand.

Maybe a prayer.
Maybe your name.

You're pushing back.

Water turns black for a second.

Aryn is projected against the pavements.

She's not up yet.

Taera screams.

The city is shaking.

You want to stop.

The Chaos won't.

combat_taera.title: The Earth
combat_taera.text:
Taera sets up walls.

Not around you.

Around the inhabitants.

She's still protecting.

Even now.

Even from you.

You hit.

The first wall holds.

The second one too.

The third splits.

Taera falls on her knees.

His hands bleed on the stone.

She's looking at you.

Not afraid.

With grief.

**"Come back. *

One word.

You almost want to obey.

Then Erevane coughs behind you.

Wounded.
Fragile.

Anger comes back.

combat_vael.title: Air
combat_vael.text:
Vael disappears.

Come back behind you.

For the first time, he's not kidding.

**"You're not talking here. *

You're laughing.

Sound doesn't sound like your voice.

**"How long have you known me, Vael? *

He cashes the sentence like a blow.

**"Sufficient to know you're suffering. *

**"Everyone suffers. *

**"Yes. *

He smiled sadly.

**"But not everyone has an apocalyptic sword to mishandle this. *

That should have made you laugh.

Could have.

In another life.

combat_ikar.title: Fire
combat_ikar.text:
Ikar comes last.

Of course.

Fire against the Chaos.

His face is covered in dust.

A cut through his cheek.

He's not looking at Erevane.

Not anymore.

He's looking at you.

**"It's my fault. *

The sentence splits something into you.

**"Yes. *

He's nodding his head.

He accepts.

**"But I won't let you disappear because of me. *

He's attacking.

This time, not to kill.

To hold you back.

But holding a storm with bare hands
remains a way of dying.

les_quatre_tombent.title: They fall
les_quatre_tombent.text:
One by one,
They're falling.

Not dead.

Not yet.

But defeated.

Aryn against the inn steps.
Taera by the wall she set up for the inhabitants.
Vael on a broken roof.
Ikar kneeling in front of you.

He's still trying to get up.

Sure.

You point the blade towards him.

He doesn't look down.

**"Come back.** he said.

Not an order.

A request.

Too late.

Too human.

The Chaos rubs.

epargner_ikar.title: Too bad to come back
epargner_ikar.text:
You lower the blade.

Just a second.

Ikar sees him.

Aryn, too.

Taera hands.

Even Vael lifts his head.

There's still something.

A wire.

Damn.
Almost invisible.

Then Erevane talks behind you:

**"They will do it again. *

The sentence cuts the wire.

You close your eyes.

When you reopen them,
The purple light has invaded everything.

You saved Ikar.

But you didn't come back.

chaos_gagne.title: The Chaos Win
chaos_gagne.text:
The sky folds.

Not really.

But everyone who looks at him would swear yes.

The violet light rises from the broken street.

The Four can't move anymore.

Erevane walks to you.

Slowly.

Like a priest to an altar.

**"See? "** he whispers.

His voice trembles.

**"This was not the end. *

You look around.

Red town.
The hidden inhabitants.
The Four on the floor.
Erevane behind you.

And finally, you understand.

You didn't win your freedom.

You only changed cages.

trop_tard.title: Too bad.
trop_tard.text:
The Four wanted to save the player.

Erevane wanted to save the Chaos.

The difference is huge.

You see her now.

Now that Aryn can't reach out.
Now that Taera can't protect the street anymore.
Now that Vael can't say anything.
Now that Ikar's lowered his blade.

Now that there's no one between you
And what you're wearing.

You want to step back.

You want to say their names.

You still want to be someone we can bring back.

But the Chaos doesn't look back.

fin_catastrophe.title: The Sacred Disaster
fin_catastrophe.text:
Later we'll say that Sorn survived.

Technically.

The walls still hold.
The streets still exist.

But Sorn is no longer a city.

It's a scar.

The Chaos crossed Aerith as an idea
We can't undo it anymore.

Erevane got what he wanted.

Three hundred years of waiting.

For this.

The Four are alive.

Somewhere.

Aryn's still looking.

Taera replants.

Vael walks in places where the air is different.

Ikar didn't hit his blade.

They're looking for a way to fix it.

He's not sure he exists.

But they're looking.

Because that's what they do.

Because that's what they've always done.

And you.

You're here.

Somewhere in this.

The cold black blade in your hand.

You remember Yerevane saying,
The Chaos is not a curse. It's a gift. *

You remember Taera's seed.

Two blows on the anvil.

Marek's knife.

These things have not been destroyed.

They still exist.

Somewhere.

Maybe it's a start.

Maybe.

detail_cloche.title: Something
detail_cloche.text:
Erevane knows too much.

No generalities.

Details.

Marek's name.
The color of Aryn's blade.
The exact moment the Chaos woke up.

**"How do you know all this? *

He's shaking the embers.

**"I have been studying Chaos for a long time. *

**"How long? *

Take a break.

Short.

**"Very long. *

He doesn't look at you saying that.

You put the observation away.

Not knowing what to do with it.

remarquer_changement.title: The Mirror
remarquer_changement.text:
You see your reflection in a pond.

You stop.

Your eyes.

They have a tint.

Violet.

Light.

As if the blade had started to turn off.

You're thinking about Taera.

*The earth knows when someone is empty. *

You're thinking about Aryn.

The Chaos is in you but you are bigger than the Chaos. *

You're thinking about Vael.

*People who arrive at the right time with exactly the right answers. *

You put those thoughts away.

Erevane calls you from the clearing.

You follow.

voix_erevane.title: His Voice
voix_erevane.text:
**"A bridge is rebuilt. *

He says that too easily.

Like someone who said that phrase a lot of times.

Not to comfort you.

To move on.

**"The important thing is that you learn. *

The important thing. *

Not the child.
Not the merchant.
Not the bridge.

The important thing is that you learn. *

You can't tell if it's wisdom or something.

You're watching Erevane.

He's already turning a page of his book.

He's already moved on.

observer_erevane_sorn.title: The Observer
observer_erevane_sorn.text:
Erevane is calm.

Too quiet.

The city whispers its name outside.
The Four are somewhere on the streets.

He's reading.

An old book.
Not the one he showed you.

Another one.

The cover is different.

Not black.

Dark red.

He closes it when he sees you looking.

**"Old Treaty.** he said.
**"Womany. *

He smiles.

His usual smile.

But her eyes go to the door for a second.

Like he's expecting something.

erevane_confirme.title: Confirmation
erevane_confirme.text:
You go back to Erevane.

**"Is that true? *

He's not answering right now.

That silence.

This silence says everything.

**"I was there.** he finally says.
**"But Caël had made his own choices. *

**"You told him the same thing you told me. *

**"I told the truth. *

**"Your truth. *

He doesn't deny it.

He doesn't confirm either.

It's not the same thing as lying.

But that's not the truth either.

And you know that now.

You know that.
